summary: The diff implements all requested removals: the 'View formulas' button and FormulasDialog were removed from the frontend, the industryGrowthPercent field was removed from the DcfInputs interface and all presets, the backend DcfInput type was updated to remove industryGrowthPercent, and all references to industryGrowthPercent were removed from formulas.ts, calculations.ts, and related files. A migration file was added to handle the backend type change. All requirements appear to be implemented.

hallucinated_features.description: Added backend/migration.mo file with migration logic for handling old DcfInputs type
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest did not request adding a migration file or migration logic. The request only asked to remove fields, not to handle data migration.
